description_long: This object is a detailed sculpture of an owl perched on a textured base resembling a tree stump. The owl features prominent, forward-facing eyes with a yellow iris and dark pupils, giving it a lifelike and alert expression. Its head is adorned with raised feather tufts, characteristic of horned owls, and the beak is short and hooked. The plumage is intricately carved, with layered feathers on the wings and back, and subtle color gradients from dark brown to lighter tan and cream tones. The talons are visible gripping the base, and the overall surface has a slightly rough, matte finish, mimicking the texture of real feathers and bark. This sculpture would likely be found as a decorative element in parks, gardens, or urban green spaces.
description: A realistic, intricately carved owl sculpture with lifelike eyes, feather tufts, and textured plumage, perched on a tree stump base. The coloration blends dark browns, tans, and creams, with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description_view_0: The rear and left side of the owl are visible, highlighting the detailed feather texture on the back and wing, as well as the rounded shape of the head and body.
description_view_1: The front view shows the owl's expressive face, large yellow eyes, hooked beak, and both talons gripping the base, with feather tufts clearly visible.
description_view_2: The right side of the owl is shown, displaying the profile of the head, the curvature of the beak, and the layered wing feathers.
description_view_3: The back and right side of the owl are visible, emphasizing the broad wings, detailed feather pattern, and the rounded tail feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mottled with gradients of brown, tan, and cream, with subtle barring on wings and back
